original text:
About Shape  What We Do and How We Got to Here.
Chris is the CEO of Shape. He is responsible for architecting and developing on Shape's core platform. In the past, he has taken lead roles on large scale software projects for marketing agencies and other tech companies like Intel. Chris brings that exceptional experience and technical skill, not to mention his great attitude, to the Shape team.
David is a co-founder and Senior Developer. He is a talented full stack coder responsible for maintaining the site and developing new features. He attended Oregon State University pursuing a degree in Computer Science before jumping into the startup world full time. When he isn't working on Shape he enjoys hanging out with his girlfriend and rooting for his favorite athlete Novak Djokovic.
Dominic is the VP of Engineering at Shape. He joined the founders through a series of very fortunate encounters in Bend, Oregon. His focus constantly shifts to wherever the fire is hottest. He commands the front end of the Shape platform, directs engineering resources on the back end, and provides design work for the sales and marketing team. Outside of work, he loves to explore the world's places with good friends and family.
Jon is a co-founder of Shape. He spent 7 years as a PPC consultant, agency analyst and department manager before leaving to build useful apps for other PPC analysts. The origins of Shape come from problems Jon saw first hand in the industry. He focuses on product direction, customer service and sales for our company, reach out to him with any questions at jon@shape.io.
Maxwel is the 'jack of all trades' of the Shape office working in Sales Development, Customer Service, Client Success, Digital Marketing, and Culture Appreciation. A graduate of Oregon State University living in Bend, Oregon, Max brings a load of digital marketing and sales experience to the team. If not in the Shape office, Max likes long rides on Mt. Bachelor, a good game in his hands, and time well spent with those he cares about.
Nicole is the VP of Marketing & Communications at Shape. She has an extensive background in the PPC industry working as an analyst, department head and product manager. Nicole's focus is crafting our website, marketing materials and support documents to clearly communicate how PPC professionals can benefit from our platform. When she's not working, she enjoys hiking with her husband and half golden retriever/half tornado (Parker), baking, and reading.
Tyler is VP of Business Development at Shape. He comes from 6 years as an analyst, account manager and sales consultant focused in the PPC industry. He was responsible for millions of dollars of client spend at his agency job as a Shape customer. Tyler is excited to use his experience to help relate to the challenges that face PPC analysts and how Shape can help. When he isn't working he enjoys golfing and playing with his dog Carl.
Our founding team's experience in digital marketing lends a perspective to product decisions that is especially empathetic to the day-to-day challenges faced by our customers. This is the product we always wished existed.
We've spent a lot of time manually updating Excel spreadsheets and Google Docs. An analyst's time is valuable. Time should be spent on the fun challenges of being an analyst: the optimization leading to improvement of performance. Analysts know the more time spent on optimizing the better it is for everyone.
Shape is a team of developers, designers and analysts with the goal of serving digital marketing professionals and the organizations they run.
We love hearing ideas from analysts about how software could make their lives better. If you have an idea for an improvement, or a suggestion for Shape, please reach out. View our Contact Page for more details about how to get in touch.

original text:
Sunday Funday is just around the corner and Party Store Productions and The Majestic Cafe have teamed up to make sure that you have something fun to do! This Sunday they will be bringing Frankie Cosmos to the stage alongside All Dogs and Stef.
Funny little fact about Frankie Cosmos, Greta Klein is Kevin Kline & Phoebe Cates kid! Kevin and Phoebe met in 1989 on on audition for "The Big Chill" and have been together ever since. Greta goes by the name of Frankie Cosmos and performs alongside her partner Aaron Maine.
The show is $10 in advance and tickets can be purchased here. The fun starts at 8 p.m. on Sunday and all ages are welcome to the attend the show. We also have one pair of tickets to give away courtesy of Party Store Productions. If you would like to enter to win a pair of tickets, please email your full name to hipindetroit@gmail.com with the subject line #cosmos. We will draw one lucky winner at the end of the week and email that winner details on how to claim their prize!

original text:
Imagen Marketing Consultants, Orlando's newest multicultural marketing agency and Volusia Hispanic Chamber of Commerce would like to invite you to participate in the 1st ever Viva Volusia International Latino Arts, Culture and Culinary Festival, Labor Day Weekend August 30-Sept 1, 2013. This 3-day event will be the largest international festival to be held in Daytona Beach, that will honor and celebrate the 500th Anniversary of Juan Ponce De Leon's discovery of La Florida as well as the rich history and culture of our growing communities. Viva Volusia will feature carnival games, music stages, performances, health pavilion, arts & crafts, international food vendors. We Will feature a special twist for foodies - a Chorizo Sausage cook off. Chorizo was one of the many items contributed by the Spaniards to Latin America, and every Latin American country has their own form of the Chorizo sausage, which will be featured throughout the food booths.
We hope you will join us in celebrating Viva Volusia International Latino Arts, Culture and Culinary Festival, Labor Day Weekend. If you are interested in becoming a sponsor or a vendor, please contact Amy Vega (386) 243 - 9423, avega@imagenconsultants.com or the Volusia Hispanic Chamber of Commerce at (386) 626-4264.

This 3-day event will be the largest international festival to be held in Daytona Beach, that will honor and celebrate the 500th Anniversary of Juan Ponce De Leon's discovery of La Florida as well as the rich history and culture of our growing communities. Viva Volusia will feature carnival games, music stages, performances, health pavilion, arts & crafts, international food vendors. We Will feature a special twist for foodies - a Chorizo Sausage cook off. Chorizo was one of the many items contributed by the Spaniards to Latin America, and every Latin American country has their own form of the Chorizo sausage, which will be featured throughout the food booths.
We hope you will join us in celebrating Viva Volusia International Latino Arts, Culture and Culinary Festival, Labor Day Weekend. If you are interested in becoming a sponsor or a vendor, please contact Amy Vega (386) 243 - 9423,  or the Volusia Hispanic Chamber of Commerce at (386) 626-4264.

original text:
Explosives through PESO's online "Explosives Return System (ERS)"
Ammonium Nitrate through PESO's online "Ammonium Nitrate Return System (ANRS)"
PESO's online "Explosives Return System (ERS)" and "Ammonium Nitrate Return System (ANRS)" will not be available for the licenses which are not issued by District Authorities through LSDA and they will be barred from carrying out both online and manual transactions such as raising indents, purchase, sale, transport & use of Explosives & Ammonium Nitrate with effect from 15th July, 2017.
Hence they are advised to get their manual licenses re-issued (Back log Entry) through LSDA by the respective District Authority on or before 14th July, 2017 to avoid inconvenience.
For any further query and support, you may email on support.lsda@explosives.gov.in or call on at telephone Nos 0712-2510873 / 0712-2510291.
Manual for Form P5 Import (Return Form R3 and R4).
Click on Guideline link for User Manual, to fill Ammonium Nitrate Monthly Returns.
Disclaimer : All efforts have been taken to secure the information pertaining to licensee and R-2, R-3, R-4, R-5, R-7, R-8, R-9, R-10, R-11(b),R-12, R-13 details. This website has been secured to prevent hacking or any kind of unauthorised access or unathourised usage of information pertaining to individual license hardware firewall. Similarly all efforts have been made to make the information as accurate as possible. However, 'Petroleum and Explosives Safety Organisation' will not be responsible in the event of any loss to any person/company caused by inaccuracy in information available on PESO server. The users should make all efforts to verify the accuracy of accounts maintained. Any discrepancy found may be brought to the notice of PESO (support.an@explosives.gov.in).
Copyright @ 2015 Peso, Nagpur. All Rights Reserved.Rights Reserved.
This Application is optimised for 1024x768 screen resolution for IE 9.0 and Higher Versions.
